mapper.select: SELECT id AS id, name AS name, unified_social_credit_code AS creditCode, industry AS industry, establish_date AS establishDate, address AS address, legal_person AS legalPerson, contact_phone AS contactPhone, employee_count AS employeeCount, status AS status FROM company WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT * FROM company WHERE unified_social_credit_code = #{creditCode} LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM company ORDER BY id DESC
SELECT * FROM company WHERE region_id = #{regionId} ORDER BY id DESC
SELECT * FROM company WHERE status = #{status} ORDER BY id DESC
SELECT * FROM company WHERE name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR unified_social_credit_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ORDER BY id DESC

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM company
AND (name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR unified_social_credit_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
